themeName: Deck & Dice: Casual Board Game Cruise

visual.aestheticLabel: Deck & Dice â Cozy CafÃ© at Sea

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: Use LLL brand headline first; fallback to a warm geometric sans with rounded corners for approachable, cafÃ© energy.
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Use LLL brand body first; fallback to a humanist sans with relaxed tracking for easy reading at mobile sizes.
suggestedFonts: Fallback headlines: Quicksand, Nunito, or Sora
Fallback body: Inter, Cabin, or Work Sans

visual.imageryMood: Calm, window-lit sea life with tactile cafÃ© texturesâlinen, wood grain, soft paperâset against open water and island silhouettes; a mellow, lo-fi hush where conversation and the horizon feel equally present.
visual.lightingStyle: Soft morning glow through large windows, gentle overcast mid-day blues, and golden-hour warmth drifting into string-light twilight on deck; avoid hard flash or nightclub beams.
visual.compositionNotes: Lead with ship and ocean: rail lines, panoramic windows, deck teak, horizon. Keep scenes uncluttered, 1â2 people or a single hand detail, an empty chair invitingly pulled back. Use negative space, shallow depth of field, and small, believable cues (a pocket deck, a linen mat corner) rather than tables piled high. Wardrobe hints (soft knits, enamel pin, cuffed sleeves) and posture (lean-in, shared smile) carry the niche without crowding the frame.
avoidList: Crowded tournament tables and bracket signage
Vendor backdrops, expo banners, or podiums
Whiteboards, rule posters, or staff in matching polos
Mega terrain dioramas, crates of minis, or taped floor plans
PA mics, timers, or loud scoreboards
Overly branded table tents dominating the foreground
Any scene that reads like a classroom or convention hall
referenceMoodboard: Horizon line through a Voyager-class picture window
Teak deck rail with soft dusk reflection
Greek Isles blue dusk with quiet harbor lights
Linen table runner, single pencil, paper score slip corner
Two mugs and a single pocket deck by a window
String-light glow on an open deck lounge chair
Shallow DOF hands-adjusting a small token; ocean blur beyond
Clean ship architecture lines framing sky and water

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Cruise-first visuals; the board-game vibe appears as gentle, guest-carried habits at cafÃ© tables and rail-side momentsânever as a staged event.
cruiseNativeMoments: Sunrise coffee in a panoramic lounge
Leisurely sea-day reading nook by the window
Golden-hour deck stroll beneath string lights
Post-dinner dessert and a quiet chat in the cafÃ©
Aft-rail sailaway with wind in hair and soft music
nicheEnhancedMoments: A pocket deck appears after cappuccino; two guests share a few turns, then drift to the rail
A slim co-op board on a linen mat for an unhurried sea-day chapter; one pencil, one score slip
Twilight social deduction energy suggested by close eye contact and a quick grinâno pile of props
A minimalist card tray beside dessert plates; soft rule hint passed across the table
A small meeple pin on a cardigan sparks a friendly âwhat do you like to play?â at the bar
A traveler tucks a compact box under arm during a deck strollâconversation first, game second
implausibleLiteralizations: Esports-style stage with prize purse and commentators
Vendor expo rows or industry news panels
Rules certification classes or pro clinics
Mandatory marathon sessions occupying a venue for hours
Color-coded seating charts, sign-up walls, or check-out kiosks
Giant terrain layouts monopolizing multiple tables
allowedProps: Pocket-size card decks in neutral boxes
Small dice tray or card holder in wood or linen
Single compact co-op board with minimal footprint
Small score slip and a single pencil
Soft cloth or parchment-like play mat
One small token dish or coaster
discouragedProps: Leaderboards, bracket posters, or foam-core signage
Rolling AV carts, ring lights, or cables
Multiple tables pushed together into a command center
Crates of minis, terrain walls, or neoprene megamats
Whiteboards, flip charts, or classroom seating

messaging.subSlogan: A cozy cafÃ©-at-sea vibe for people who love wood-and-cardboard moments, easy conversation, and the Aegean horizon.

ctaVariants.waitlist: Hold a spot on the sailing

messaging.elevatorPitch: Deck & Dice is a mellow, cruise-native take on tabletop life aboard Explorer of the Seas (Voyager-class). Think Greek Isles sunlight, window-side tables, and a friendly culture where a pocket deck or slim co-op board might surface after coffee. You might notice a favorite someone brought along and share a quick tip in a minute or two, and most play happens the way great vacation moments doâat your pace, between ports, with dessert on the way. Ports and dining stay center stage; the games simply add warmth to sea-day downtime and low-key nights under string lights.
messaging.voicePersona: Your kind, rules-light game friend who knows the shipâs best window seats and never rushes a good conversation.

merch.conceptStatement: Cute, print-friendly tees that pair cruise silhouettes with tactile tabletop cuesâdice, tiles, and tiny tokensâstyled in 1â3 colors for real POD production. Tone: cozy, witty, and deck-ready.

coreItem.colorway: Navy tee with cream + sunset coral ink

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Sea air in the morning, a window seat by the water, and time to linger. On this Greek Isles sailing aboard Explorer of the Seas, the day moves at cafÃ© paceâsoft music, warm wood, and just enough cardboard to spark a smile. A pocket deck after coffee. A quiet co-op as the sun leans low. Dessert arrives, the horizon breathes, and the next turn is yoursâwhenever you feel like taking it.
audio.hypeClipScript: Blue water. A window wink of sun. A soft tap of dice and a shared nod. Deck lights rise; the Aegean turns to gold. Grab a seat, trade a tip, play a roundâor just watch the sea roll by. Deck & Dice: cozy cafÃ© at sea, all week long.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm alto/tenor, unhurried, smile-forward, zero announcer grit; neutral accent, intimate mic, light room tone.
audio.musicMood: Mellow lo-fi with soft vinyl hiss, brushed percussion, cozy Rhodes keys, and gentle sea ambience; tempo relaxed, no big dropsâship-first, cafÃ©-quiet energy.

tiktokOrganic.hook: A shared glance > the rulebook. Golden-hour window, sea doing the talking.

narrative.title: Side-by-Side, One Quiet Read
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Two people sink into a window seat aboard Explorer of the Seas. The Aegean rolls by. They trade a knowing smile like a secret strategy without pieces on the table. One points lightly at the horizon as if calling a move. Beat of laughter. Text on screen: âSea days, shared turns.â
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first: horizon framed by a large pane, soft knit sleeves, relaxed posture; no visible cards or dice. Shallow DOF on eyes and hands resting on the armrest. Negative space and the sea carry the vibe.
narrative.backgroundDescription: Panoramic lounge window with soft morning-to-golden light. Teak and linen textures nearby, empty chair slightly pulled back.
narrative.musicMood: Mellow lo-fi, brushed percussion, gentle Rhodes, soft sea ambience

tiktokOrganic.caption: A little strategy, mostly scenery. Explorer of the Seas makes the best third player. Sea days, shared turns.
tiktokOrganic.callToAction: Hold a spot on the sailing

instagramReels.visualConcept: Golden-hour deck stroll beneath string lights. Two guests walk shoulder-to-shoulder, jackets light, hair in the breeze. They pause at the rail, trade a quick grin that reads like a bluff but no components shown.
instagramReels.audioTrackType: Lo-fi instrumental with light vinyl hiss and soft sea wash
instagramReels.caption: We take our turns between sunsets. Explorer of the Seas, Aegean-kissed and unhurried.

carouselSlides.headline: Window seats > rule sheets
carouselSlides.bodyText: Find your calm, then decide if a turn fits the moment.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Large picture window, single mug, folded linen napkin; empty chair pulled back. No game items.

carouselSlides.headline: A pocket deck after coffee
carouselSlides.bodyText: Two or three hands, then back to the view.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: A slim neutral deck appears beside a demitasse; ocean blur beyond. One pencil, no clutter.

carouselSlides.headline: The horizon teaches tempo
carouselSlides.bodyText: No rush. Ports and dinner first; play drifts in when it feels right.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Aft-rail panorama, soft teal water trails, hands resting on the rail; no objects.

carouselSlides.headline: Small board, big exhale
carouselSlides.bodyText: A slim co-op chapter, linen mat, dessert en route.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Minimalist board with two tokens on a small mat; room for plates and conversation.

carouselSlides.headline: Signal in the knit
carouselSlides.bodyText: A tiny meeple pin, a shared nod, an easy opener at the cafÃ©.
carouselSlides.visualDescription: Close-up of cardigan cuff with subtle enamel pin; bokeh of ship architecture.

instagramFeed.caption: Deck & Dice aboard Explorer of the Seas: Greek Isles light, cafÃ© pace, and just enough cardboard to warm a sea day.

facebookAd.headline: Sea days, shared turns.
facebookAd.primaryText: Explorer of the Seas, Greek Isles light, and a cozy cafÃ©-at-sea rhythm. Play a pocket deck after coffee, or simply watch the water. The ship stays the hero; the game is just a warm extra.

discordBanner.serverBannerDescription: Wide horizon through a ship window with soft morning glow; subtle linen texture overlay and the line âSea days, shared turns.â in warm geometric sans.
discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Friendly, rules-light greeting: âWelcome aboard Explorer of the Seas. Find a window seat, say hi, share a favorite if youâd likeâor just enjoy the view.â No schedules, no pressure; emphasize ship-first calm.

heroExplainer.title: Deck & Dice â Cozy CafÃ© at Sea (Explorer of the Seas)
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Narration (warm, unhurried): âSea air in the morning. A window seat by the water. On Explorer of the Seas, days move at cafÃ© paceâsoft music, warm wood, and just enough cardboard to spark a smile. Maybe a pocket deck after coffee. Maybe a quiet co-op as the sun leans low. Dessert arrives, the horizon breathes, and the next turn is yoursâwhenever you feel like taking it.â On-screen text beats: Sea days, shared turns. Greek Isles light. Cards optional.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first montage: picture windows, teak rails, relaxed posture, soft knit sleeves, two-person smiles. One brief shot of a slim deck and one of a compact boardânever cluttered, never staged. Destination whispers: whitewashed harbor distant, blue dusk.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Panoramic lounge, open deck under string lights, cafÃ© nook with linen textures; Aegean water as constant backdrop.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Mellow lo-fi with brushed percussion, Rhodes, and gentle sea ambience

tiktokSeed.title: The Bluff Without Pieces
tiktokSeed.scriptOrNarration: No VO. Text on screen: âWhen the horizon is the third player.â Quick eye-contact beat; half-smile; they both look back to the water. Tag: âSea days, shared turns.â
tiktokSeed.visualDirectionNotes: Two guests seated side-by-side at a window, hands relaxed on armrests. No visible game items. Focus on posture and micro-expressions.

thresholdAnnouncement.title: Sailaway Pace, Locked In
